calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Cross-Commplainant El St. John, for failure to obtain Judgment or file Dismissal on Cross-Complaint is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Continued To Dec-16-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Cross-Complainants, for failure to obtain Judgment or file Dismissal on Cross-Complaint is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for Cross-Complainat Jeffrey Lindquist's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that the Cross-Complaint filed by Jeffrey Lindquist is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. (Cross-Complaiant El St. John in bankruptcy). Court ordered OSC to Cross-Complainant El St. John re-set to 12/16/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. OSC for failure to obtain Judgment of file Dismissal on Cross-Complaint. Proceedings reported by: Vickie Gross, CSR# 5525 (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2004 Continued To Sep-30-04 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Cross-Complainant, for failure to obtain Judgment of file Dismissal is heard this day. Court ordered Cross-Complainant Jeffrey Lindquist sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/30/2004 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
